void Function_958(var uParam0, var uParam1) //Position: 0x38698
{
    if (!IS_ACTOR_VALID(&uParam0))
    {
        return;
    }
    if (GET_ACTOR_ENUM(&uParam0) == 1194 && GET_ACTOR_ENUM(&uParam0) == 1193)
    {
        return;
    }
    if (!DECOR_CHECK_EXIST(&uParam0, "carSettings"))
    {
        Unknown_Function();
    }
    uVar0 = DECOR_GET_INT(&uParam0, "carSettings");
    Function_38(&uVar0, uParam1);
    DECOR_SET_INT(&uParam0, "carSettings", uVar0);
    return;
}
